content.problemStatement:
Chef has an array AAA of NNN elements denoted by A0,A1,‚Ä¶,AN‚àí1A_{0}, A_{1}, \ldots, A_{N-1}A0‚Äã,A1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚àí1‚Äã.
He thinks about MMM questions of following kind: "What is the maximum element among AiA_{i}Ai‚Äã where iii lies between min(x,y)min(x, y)min(x,y) and max(x,y)max(x, y)max(x,y) both inclusive?"

You have to help Chef to find out sum of answers of all the MMM questions.

Method of generation of values xxx and yyy for all MMM questions:

You are given two integersx1 x_{1}x1‚Äã and y1y_{1}y1‚Äã denoting values of xxx and yyy for the first question.
For the next questions, values of xix_{i}xi‚Äã and yiy_{i}yi‚Äã are generated in the following way:

xi=(xi‚àí1+7)%(N‚àí1)x_{i} = (x_{i-1} + 7) \% (N - 1)xi‚Äã=(xi‚àí1‚Äã+7)%(N‚àí1)

yi=(yi‚àí1+11)%Ny_{i} = (y_{i-1} + 11) \% Nyi‚Äã=(yi‚àí1‚Äã+11)%N

Where %\%% represents the modulo operation.
constraints: The first question: x1=0x_{1} = 0x1‚Äã=0, y1=1y_{1} = 1y1‚Äã=1. Therefore answer for the first query =2= 2=2.
The second question: x2=(0+7)%2=1x_{2} = (0 + 7) \% 2 = 1x2‚Äã=(0+7)%2=1, y2=(1+11)%3=0y_{2} = (1 + 11) \% 3 = 0y2‚Äã=(1+11)%3=0. Therefore answer for the second query =2= 2=2
Therefore, the sum of answers is 777.
content.inputFormat:
The first line contains a single integer NNN, denoting the number of elements in the array.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers, denoting A0,A1,‚Ä¶,AN‚àí1A_{0}, A_{1}, \ldots, A_{N-1}A0‚Äã,A1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚àí1‚Äã.
The third line contains three space-separated integers MMM, x1x_{1}x1‚Äã, and y1y_{1}y1‚Äã.
content.outputFormat: Output a single integer denoting the sum of the answers to the questions.
